headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

headline: Costco proves it’s winning the price war
summary: These days, consumers don't exactly have unlimited budgets. And it's easy to see why. In February, the Consumer Price Index rose 2.4% on an annual basis. And households across a range of incomes are feeling the pain of persistent inflation. A recent Harris Poll data published by the Journal of ...

headline: Trump tariffs live updates: Trump waives Jones Act shipping law, EU restarts trade deal ratification
summary: As the US pursues new tariffs on nations with which it trades, the White House is also grappling with soaring energy costs as a result of the geopolitical supply shock in the Middle East.

headline: Costco: A Likely Outperformer Based On The Business Model, Despite Disruptions
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation stands out for its efficient, high-margin business model and long-term outperformance versus Walmart. Learn more about COST stock here.

headline: Target launches another generous deal to win back shoppers' trust
summary: Target is not backing down from its plan to recover its reputation and win over customers.
